name: Subscription
description: Track per-user subscription tiers with automatic role changes and expiration notifications.
author: Arediss

capabilityReasons.users:read: Looks up user email / display name for subscription records and notifications.
capabilityReasons.users:write: Promotes users to the tier role on assignment and downgrades/disables them on expiration.
capabilityReasons.settings:plugin: Stores tiers + subscriptions in the plugin data dir and reads plugin-level settings (notify days, auto-kick flags).
capabilityReasons.settings:app: Reads the app's plexMachineId setting to resolve the Plex server for auto-kick.
capabilityReasons.notifications: Sends per-user notifications before and on subscription expiration.
capabilityReasons.permissions: Declares admin-only permissions for tier and subscription management routes.

settings.label: Days before expiration to send notification
Also send a notification on the expiration day itself
Days after expiration before the auto-kick fires

jobs.label: Check subscriptions for upcoming and past expirations
